dependencies.relationship: RegisterUserHandlers uses apikit.APIError, apikit.SetETag, apikit.CheckETag, apikit.CacheNoStore from server_core and registers on the Echo APIGroup
All handlers query the users, api_keys, pats, orgs, org_members tables via *sql.DB provided by database_layer; uses db.FormatTime and db.ErrNotFound
All admin handlers call auth.RequireAdmin; self-service handlers call auth.RequirePermission and auth.GetUserID from auth_middleware

subtasks.title: Define CreateUserRequest, UpdateUserRequest, User, APIKeyMeta, PATMeta structs
details: Define CreateUserRequest with Username, Email, Provider, ProviderID string fields and json tags.
Define UpdateUserRequest with FullName *string and json tag (pointer to distinguish absent from empty).
Define User struct with all 10 fields: ID, Username, Email, FullName, Role, Status, Provider, ProviderID, CreatedAt, UpdatedAt.
Define APIKeyMeta with KeyID, UserID, CreatedAt string and ExpiresAt, RevokedAt *string.
Define PATMeta with TokenID, Name string, Permissions []string, UserID, CreatedAt string, ExpiresAt, RevokedAt *string.

subtasks.title: Implement RegisterUserHandlers with all 15 route registrations
details: Implement RegisterUserHandlers(g *echo.Group, database *sql.DB) storing the db handle in a handler struct or closure.

Register all 15 routes: POST /users, GET /users, GET /users/:id, PATCH /users/:id, POST /users/:id/promote, POST /users/:id/demote, POST /users/:id/block, POST /users/:id/unblock, GET /users/:id/keys, DELETE /users/:id/keys/:key_id, GET /users/:id/tokens, DELETE /users/:id/tokens/:token_id, GET /user, PATCH /user, GET /user/orgs.
All handler functions are unexported closures or methods; only RegisterUserHandlers is exported.
Stub each handler with panic("not implemented") initially.

checks: Package compiles with all type definitions: go build ./internal/handlers/...
RegisterUserHandlers signature matches spec: go vet ./internal/handlers/...

Requirements 07-REQ-1.1, 07-REQ-1.2 acceptance criteria met

subtasks.title: Implement createUser handler with auth, validation, and UUID generation
details: Call auth.RequireAdmin(c); return immediately if it returns an error.
Bind request body into CreateUserRequest; on bind error return apikit.APIError(c, 400, 'invalid request body').
Validate all four fields non-empty: for each missing/empty field return apikit.APIError(c, 400, 'missing required field: <field>').
Generate ID with uuid.New().String(); set role='user', status='active', full_name='', created_at/updated_at = db.FormatTime(time.Now().UTC()).
INSERT into users table via *sql.DB.

subtasks.title: Implement createUser conflict detection and 201 response
details: Inspect INSERT error for SQLite unique constraint violations: detect UNIQUE constraint on username -> 409 'username already exists'; detect UNIQUE constraint on (provider, provider_id) -> 409 'provider identity already exists'.
For unexpected DB errors return apikit.APIError(c, 500, 'internal server error').
On success build User struct from inserted values and return c.JSON(201, user).
provider field stored verbatim without any validation.

subtasks.title: Implement listUsers handler with include_blocked filtering
details: Call auth.RequireAdmin(c); return if error.
Read includeBlocked := c.QueryParam('include_blocked'); build SELECT query with WHERE status='active' unless includeBlocked == 'true'.
Scan rows into []User; on DB error return 500; if no rows return c.JSON(200, []User{}) (not nil slice).
Return c.JSON(200, users).

checks: createUser and listUsers compile: go build ./internal/handlers/...
Create user tests pass: go test ./internal/handlers/... -count=1 -v -run 'TestCreateUser'
List users tests pass: go test ./internal/handlers/... -count=1 -v -run 'TestListUsers'
No linter warnings: go vet ./internal/handlers/...
Requirements 07-REQ-2.1 through 07-REQ-2.6, 07-REQ-2.E1, 07-REQ-3.1 through 07-REQ-3.3, 07-REQ-3.E1, 07-REQ-3.E2 acceptance criteria met

subtasks.title: Implement getUser handler with ETag support
details: Call auth.RequireAdmin(c); return if error.
Read id := c.Param('id'); query users table by id.
If db.ErrNotFound is returned, return apikit.APIError(c, 404, 'user not found').
Call apikit.SetETag(c, user.UpdatedAt).
Call apikit.CheckETag(c, user.UpdatedAt); if cache hit return c.NoContent(304).
Return c.JSON(200, user).

subtasks.title: Implement updateUser handler with pointer-based field detection
details: Call auth.RequireAdmin(c); return if error.
Read id := c.Param('id'); bind body into UpdateUserRequest.
Check req.FullName == nil (pointer absent); return apikit.APIError(c, 400, 'missing required field: full_name') if nil.
Query user by id; if not found return 404.
UPDATE users SET full_name=*req.FullName, updated_at=now WHERE id=id.
Return c.JSON(200, updatedUser).

checks: getUser and updateUser compile: go build ./internal/handlers/...
Get user tests pass: go test ./internal/handlers/... -count=1 -v -run 'TestGetUser'
Update user tests pass: go test ./internal/handlers/... -count=1 -v -run 'TestUpdateUser'
No linter warnings: go vet ./internal/handlers/...
Requirements 07-REQ-4.x and 07-REQ-5.x acceptance criteria met

subtasks.title: Implement promoteUser handler with idempotency
details: Call auth.RequireAdmin(c); return if error.
Fetch user by id; return 404 if db.ErrNotFound.
If user.Role == 'admin' return c.JSON(200, user) immediately (idempotent, no DB write).
UPDATE users SET role='admin', updated_at=now WHERE id=id.
Return c.JSON(200, updatedUser).

subtasks.title: Implement demoteUser handler with last-admin safeguard
details: Call auth.RequireAdmin(c); return if error.
Fetch user by id; return 404 if not found.
If user.Role == 'user' return c.JSON(200, user) immediately (idempotent).
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE role='admin' AND status='active'; on error return 500.
If count == 1 return apikit.APIError(c, 409, 'cannot demote the last admin').
UPDATE users SET role='user', updated_at=now WHERE id=id; return c.JSON(200, updatedUser).

checks: promoteUser and demoteUser compile: go build ./internal/handlers/...
Promote tests pass: go test ./internal/handlers/... -count=1 -v -run 'TestPromoteUser'
Demote tests pass (including last-admin safeguard): go test ./internal/handlers/... -count=1 -v -run 'TestDemoteUser'
No linter warnings: go vet ./internal/handlers/...
Requirements 07-REQ-6.x, 07-REQ-7.x acceptance criteria met including 07-PROP-1 invariant

subtasks.title: Implement blockUser handler with idempotency
details: Call auth.RequireAdmin(c); return if error.
Fetch user by id; return 404 if not found.
If user.Status == 'blocked' return c.JSON(200, user) immediately (idempotent).
UPDATE users SET status='blocked', updated_at=now WHERE id=id.
Return c.JSON(200, updatedUser).

subtasks.title: Implement unblockUser handler with idempotency
details: Call auth.RequireAdmin(c); return if error.
Fetch user by id; return 404 if not found.
If user.Status == 'active' return c.JSON(200, user) immediately (idempotent).
UPDATE users SET status='active', updated_at=now WHERE id=id.
Return c.JSON(200, updatedUser).

subtasks.title: Implement listUserKeys handler returning metadata only
details: Call auth.RequireAdmin(c); return if error.
Fetch user by id; return 404 if not found (do not query api_keys).
SELECT key_id, user_id, created_at, expires_at, revoked_at FROM api_keys WHERE user_id=id.
Scan into []APIKeyMeta; never include secret/key columns.
Return c.JSON(200, keys) where keys is []APIKeyMeta{} if empty (not nil).

subtasks.title: Implement revokeUserKey handler with idempotent 204 response
details: Call auth.RequireAdmin(c); return if error.
Read id and key_id path params; SELECT key from api_keys WHERE key_id=key_id AND user_id=id.
If not found return apikit.APIError(c, 404, 'api key not found').
If key.RevokedAt != nil return c.NoContent(204) immediately (idempotent, no write).
UPDATE api_keys SET revoked_at=now WHERE key_id=key_id.
Return c.NoContent(204).

checks: listUserKeys and revokeUserKey compile: go build ./internal/handlers/...
Key listing tests pass: go test ./internal/handlers/... -count=1 -v -run 'TestListUserKeys'
Key revocation tests pass: go test ./internal/handlers/... -count=1 -v -run 'TestRevokeUserKey'
No secret fields appear in API key listing response (TS-07-E9 passes)
No linter warnings: go vet ./internal/handlers/...

subtasks.title: Implement listUserTokens handler returning PAT metadata only
details: Call auth.RequireAdmin(c); return if error.
Fetch user by id; return 404 if not found (do not query pats).
SELECT token_id, name, permissions, user_id, created_at, expires_at, revoked_at FROM pats WHERE user_id=id.
Scan permissions as JSON array []string; never include secret/token columns.
Return c.JSON(200, tokens) where tokens is []PATMeta{} if empty.

subtasks.title: Implement revokeUserToken handler with idempotent 204 response
details: Call auth.RequireAdmin(c); return if error.
Read id and token_id path params; SELECT token from pats WHERE token_id=token_id AND user_id=id.
If not found return apikit.APIError(c, 404, 'token not found').
If token.RevokedAt != nil return c.NoContent(204) immediately (idempotent, no write).
UPDATE pats SET revoked_at=now WHERE token_id=token_id.
Return c.NoContent(204).

Token listing tests pass: go test ./internal/handlers/... -count=1 -v -run 'TestListUserTokens'
Token revocation tests pass: go test ./internal/handlers/... -count=1 -v -run 'TestRevokeUserToken'
No secret fields in PAT listing response (TS-07-E10 passes)
No linter warnings: go vet ./internal/handlers/...
07-PROP-3 (revocation idempotency) and 07-PROP-4 (no secrets) invariants met

task_groups.title: Implement Self-Service Profile and Organization Handlers

subtasks.title: Implement getOwnProfile handler with permission check and ETag
details: Call auth.RequirePermission(c, 'users', 'read'); return if error (403 insufficient permissions).
Call userID := auth.GetUserID(c).
Query users table for userID.
Call apikit.SetETag(c, user.UpdatedAt).
Call apikit.CheckETag(c, user.UpdatedAt); if cache hit return c.NoContent(304).
Return c.JSON(200, user).

subtasks.title: Implement updateOwnProfile handler with users:read permission
details: Call auth.RequirePermission(c, 'users', 'read'); return if error.
Call userID := auth.GetUserID(c).
Bind UpdateUserRequest; check req.FullName == nil -> 400 'missing required field: full_name'.
Query user by userID; return 404 if not found.
UPDATE users SET full_name=*req.FullName, updated_at=now WHERE id=userID.
Return c.JSON(200, updatedUser). Note: uses users:read not users:write per design decision.

subtasks.title: Implement listOwnOrgs handler excluding blocked organizations
details: Call auth.RequirePermission(c, 'orgs', 'read'); return if error.
Call userID := auth.GetUserID(c).
SELECT o.id, o.name, o.slug, o.url, o.status, o.created_at, o.updated_at FROM orgs o JOIN org_members m ON o.id=m.org_id WHERE m.user_id=userID AND o.status='active'.
Scan into an org struct slice; return c.JSON(200, orgs) where orgs is an empty slice [] if no results.
Blocked organizations (status != 'active') are excluded by the WHERE clause.

task_groups.title: Wiring Verification: End-to-End Integration and Smoke Tests

subtasks.title: Verify execution path entry points and call chain continuity
details: Trace 07-PATH-1: confirm Echo router -> createUser -> auth.RequireAdmin -> *sql.DB INSERT -> c.JSON(201) with no stubs in the real path.
Trace 07-PATH-2: confirm demoteUser -> auth.RequireAdmin -> DB fetch -> COUNT query -> conditional 409/UPDATE -> c.JSON(200).
Trace 07-PATH-3: confirm revokeUserKey -> auth.RequireAdmin -> DB fetch -> revoked_at check -> conditional UPDATE -> c.NoContent(204).
Trace 07-PATH-4: confirm getOwnProfile -> auth.RequirePermission -> auth.GetUserID -> DB fetch -> apikit.SetETag/CheckETag -> c.JSON(200).
Trace 07-PATH-5: confirm createUser -> promoteUser -> listOwnOrgs all chain correctly with real db and auth stubs only.
Search internal/handlers/users.go for panic("not implemented") — must return 0 results.
Search for bare `// TODO` markers in handlers file — must return 0 blocking TODOs.

subtasks.title: Verify return value propagation across handler chain
details: Confirm createUser returns the full User struct (all 10 fields) as JSON 201 and callers receive it.
Confirm revokeUserKey propagates the c.NoContent(204) return and no body is sent.
Confirm getOwnProfile propagates ETag header and 304/200 response correctly.
Confirm error returns from auth helpers (RequireAdmin, RequirePermission) halt processing — verify no DB calls occur after a 403 is written.
Confirm db.ErrNotFound sentinel is correctly mapped to 404 in all handlers that query users, api_keys, and pats tables.

subtasks.title: Run all SMOKE tests with real components
details: Run: go test ./internal/handlers/... -count=1 -v -run 'TestSmoke_'.
TS-07-SMOKE-1: POST /users with real SQLite DB; verify 201, all 10 User fields present, row in DB.
TS-07-SMOKE-2: Two-call demote sequence; first returns 200 role=user, second (sole admin) returns 409.
TS-07-SMOKE-3: Two DELETE /keys calls; first returns 204 + revoked_at set, second returns 204 + revoked_at unchanged.
TS-07-SMOKE-4: GET /user returns 200+ETag; GET with matching If-None-Match returns 304; PATCH /user returns 200 with updated full_name.
TS-07-SMOKE-5: Create user (201) -> promote (200, role=admin) -> GET /user/orgs (200, correct org array).
All smoke tests use real *sql.DB against in-memory SQLite; only auth middleware is stubbed.

subtasks.title: Cross-spec entry point verification
details: Verify server_core (spec 01) calls RegisterUserHandlers(g, db) from production code — search for the call site in the server initialization path.
Verify that the *echo.Group passed is the one returned by server.APIGroup() (spec 01 interface).
Verify that *sql.DB is the live handle provided by database_layer (spec 02) — not a test stub in production code.
Verify auth.RequireAdmin and auth.RequirePermission resolve to auth_middleware (spec 05) production symbols.
Verify apikit.SetETag, apikit.CheckETag, apikit.APIError resolve to server_core (spec 01) production symbols.
Verify db.FormatTime and db.ErrNotFound resolve to database_layer (spec 02) production symbols.

subtasks.title: Final stub/dead-code audit and full suite run
details: grep -rn 'panic("not implemented")' internal/handlers/users.go — expect 0 matches.
grep -rn 'TODO' internal/handlers/users.go — expect 0 blocking items.
Confirm no handler returns a bare `return nil` in a path that should write a response.
Run full suite: go test ./... -count=1 — expect 0 failures.
Run linter: go vet ./... — expect 0 warnings.
Confirm 07-PROP-5 (auth before data access) holds in production code by code inspection: auth helper call is the first statement in each admin handler.

checks: All smoke tests pass with real SQLite components: go test ./internal/handlers/... -count=1 -v -run 'TestSmoke_'
Full test suite passes: go test ./... -count=1
No linter warnings: go vet ./...
Zero panic('not implemented') or bare TODO stubs in internal/handlers/users.go
RegisterUserHandlers is called from server production initialization code with real *sql.DB and *echo.Group
All 5 execution paths (07-PATH-1 through 07-PATH-5) are traceable end-to-end with no stub interruptions
Requirements 07-REQ-1.1 through 07-REQ-16.2 and all correctness properties 07-PROP-1 through 07-PROP-6 satisfied
